summary: Add an Audio mode selector so rust-diffforge can use local Whisper UI or cloud Deepgram Nova-3 transcription.

review_items.summary: The Audio workspace view lets users choose local or cloud dictation. Local mode keeps the existing Whisper download/status controls UI-only for this change, while cloud mode shows Deepgram Nova-3 configuration with a language selector and hidden API key field.

The recorder widget uses the selected transcription mode. Cloud mode opens a live Deepgram /v1/listen WebSocket with model nova-3, streams raw linear16 microphone chunks while push-to-talk is held, emits interim transcript updates in realtime, and publishes the final transcript back to the Audio tab when the stream closes.
Cloud mode streams push-to-talk microphone audio to Deepgram using the user's API key. Local mode continues to route through the existing local Whisper command path.

The Deepgram API key is entered through a password input, stored locally for the desktop WebView so it is available on next launch, passed only to the Tauri transcription command, and never written to policy files.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or hosted Diff Forge API change is required.

patches.summary: Add local/cloud mode controls, Deepgram Nova-3 language/API key settings, cloud readiness states, and mode-aware recorder widget behavior.
Persist the selected transcription provider, selected Deepgram language, and hidden API key in local WebView storage.
Add compact Audio mode, cloud settings, and password input styles consistent with the desktop workspace UI.
Add Deepgram request/response structs and command registration for cloud transcription.
Add the Deepgram Nova-3 transcription command using bounded request validation, WAV bytes, language selection, and transcript extraction.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the desktop app. Local Whisper controls and command names remain available; cloud transcription is opt-in and uses a user-provided Deepgram key.

data_handling.sends_audio_to_remote_service: Only when the user selects cloud mode; raw linear16 microphone chunks are streamed to Deepgram over a live WebSocket for Nova-3 transcription.
data_handling.stores_transcripts: The latest transcript continues to use existing local WebView result storage.
data_handling.api_key_storage: The Deepgram API key is stored in local WebView storage for this desktop origin and masked in the UI.

tests.summary: Validate Tauri commands and Deepgram host code.
